title: nerium indicum f. leucanthum
intro: Nerium indicum f. leucanthum, commonly known as the white oleander, is a flowering plant belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of white oleander include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its use in treating various skin conditions and wounds. White oleander can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
